SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 12\\n    warmup_steps = min(max(steps_per_epoch // 2, 1), max(total_steps // 10, 1))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step: int) -> float:\\n        if step < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step - warmup_steps) / float(max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1))\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed 256-step budget more effectively by pairing AdamW with a short warmup plus cosine decay over the actual training horizon instead of an effectively flat 100-epoch schedule.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
